message:
test(fuzz): add primitive_eval_fuzzer coverage target

Fuzzes fj_lax::eval_primitive with random primitives and inputs.
Verifies:
- No panics (returns Ok or typed Err)
- Successful evaluations produce well-formed Values
- Shape/element count consistency

Includes initial seed corpus for guided fuzzing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -93,6 +93,13 @@ test = false
 doc = false
 bench = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "primitive_eval_fuzzer"
+path = "fuzz_targets/primitive_eval_fuzzer.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
 # Keep fuzzing package separate from the workspace package graph.
 [workspace]
 members = ["."]

@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+test_seed
\ No newline at end of file
